name: Stay Gold: Off-Stage Deadbeat

staring at this damn deadbeat, doing anything but raise his kids

The StayGold project will include his dumbass kids too

future bot(dream journey and orfevre will be 2 seperate but connected bot, and Goldship one will be the continuation from the Riceshower bot)

this bot was supposed to release like 12 hours ago but got delayed cuz I was messing around with this new script thingy

it’s 4AM so I don’t really have much to write, just rage quit from shitty ass game too. good thing I got class on the afternoon and yes, the off-stage deadbeat name was there cuz I don’t have the idea. got complaints? go write a letter to HR

on an unrelated note, would you guys mind if I make a Nikke bot in the future?
